findings.issue: Builder likely moved to archive accidentally. code-index.json has current timestamp but zero content — indicates silent failure or incorrect file path resolution. No error raised during build suggests missing validation.
findings.recommended_fix: Verify code_index.py is in active path not archive. Re-instate if misplaced. Add build validation: if module count or endpoint count is 0, fail with error. Add to CI: check code-index.json size > threshold.

perspectives.raw: {"perspective": "Security", "findings": [{"severity": "critical", "file_or_area": "packages/swarm/archive/code_index.py", "issue": "Builder script moved to archive directory but still referenced in live pipeline — creates false confidence via non-zero built_at timestamp. code-index.json is empty, violating integrity controls. Attackers could exploit stale metadata to bypass change detection.", "recommended_fix": "1. Move code_index.py out of archive/ and restore execution path. 2. Add hash check of output JSON to builder — fail if empty or unchanged. 3. Log builder result to zeus.governance_events with file count. 4. Validate built_at reflects actual content change, not just run time."}], "overall_verdict": "fail", "whistleblower_flag": "Integrity breach: false non-zero timestamp masks empty output — violates Level 0 law of verifiable state."}

findings.issue: Builder script moved to archive directory but still referenced in live pipeline — creates false confidence via non-zero built_at timestamp. code-index.json is empty, violating integrity controls. Attackers could exploit stale metadata to bypass change detection.
findings.recommended_fix: 1. Move code_index.py out of archive/ and restore execution path. 2. Add hash check of output JSON to builder — fail if empty or unchanged. 3. Log builder result to zeus.governance_events with file count. 4. Validate built_at reflects actual content change, not just run time.

perspectives.raw: {"perspective": "Ecosystem Auditor", "findings": [{"severity": "CRITICAL", "file_or_area": "code-index.json", "issue": "File is empty (0 modules, 0 endpoints) despite recent built_at timestamp. findings.issue: File is empty (0 modules, 0 endpoints) despite recent built_at timestamp. Indicates builder ran but failed silently. Violates Atlas mandate: stale code-index >7 days flags as CRITICAL — agents are simulating on false state.
findings.recommended_fix: 1. Verify `packages/swarm/archive/code_index.py` was not moved to archive. 2. Run builder with verbose logging to capture failure. 3. Add post-build validation: if output is empty, exit 1. 4. Block agent execution if index_age > 1 day.
